creator: eadler@FreeBSD.org
text:
According to b.p.m X11BASE has been deprecated for a long time now.
This patch removes any use of X11BASE from the Mk/ and
corrects the vast majority of usage in the tree.  Can an exp-run
please be run with this?

http://people.freebsd.org/~eadler/files/rm-x11base-for-good.diff
